english: I need to go to the hospital.
What is the weather like today?
What do you do for work?

hindi: यहाँ से स्टेशन कितनी दूर है?
transliteration: Yahaan se steshan kitnii duur hai?
english: How far is the station from here?

hindi: क्या आप हिंदी बोल सकते हैं?
transliteration: Kyaa aap Hindii bol sakte hain?

hindi: कौन सा रंग पसंद है आपको?
transliteration: Kaun saa rang pasand hai aapko?

english: How many children do you have?

hindi: क्या मैं यहाँ बैठ सकता/सकती हूँ?
transliteration: Kyaa main yahaan baiTh saktaa/sakatii huun?

english: It will be done. / It'll happen.
